analysis_basis: manual visual analysis of project reference still

framing.composition: large biography panel plus person crop
framing.subject_crop: person side medium close-up with head and upper torso visible
framing.face_position: person face around x=0.73,y=0.31 when bio card is left; mirror when person is left

bio_card.title: white centered bold with horizontal separator
bio_card.bullets: large white text, generous line spacing

render_directives: Use for self-introduction ranges where a participant's background is being established.
Place the biography card on the side opposite the visible person.
Do not hard-code biographies; use people_map.bio_bullets only.
